use_cases: Hero section text animations with rainbow shadow wave effects
Creative landing pages requiring eye-catching animated typography
Streaming or media platform branding elements with vibrant color effects
Decorative animated elements for marketing and promotional content
ai_summary: A text animation component that displays characters with a dynamic rainbow text-shadow effect creating a wave-like motion. Uses CSS keyframes with cubic-bezier timing and staggered delays for smooth cascading animations. Highly customizable through props for colors, animation duration, font size, and stagger timing. Ideal for hero sections, creative landing pages, and anywhere vibrant animated typography is needed.
